name: tkn-codex-context-engineering
description: Preserve, resume, register, and recover Codex working context, session notes, decisions, local session history, project registry metadata, and user-global context across chats and repositories.

interface.shortDescription: Maintain and resume working context, project registry metadata, session notes, decisions, and global Codex context
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin that groups context engineering skills and scripts for repository project registration, working context, session notes, session resume, decision records, decision review, local Codex session-log extraction, and explicit import or promotion of user-global context through ~/.codex-context.
defaultPrompt: Extract and summarize a topic from local Codex session logs
Register this repository in the global Codex context registry
Promote this session's reusable learning globally
